special_mechanics.name: Spinning Sword
special_mechanics.description: Primary weapon passed down through the School of Chirin; spinning attack mechanics

special_mechanics.description: Allows projectile launch with each sword spin; duration-limited

special_mechanics.description: Creates spinning force field around player; duration-limited
